_comment: Merge the permissions and hooks blocks into your repo's .claude/settings.json. The permissions rule 'mcp__task-board' is a server-level allow that covers ALL board tools in one line — no per-tool prompts. Copy adoption/hooks/board-check.sh into your repo and adjust the path below if you place it elsewhere (e.g. .claude/hooks/board-check.sh). $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is expanded by Claude Code to the project root. Set BOARD_URL / AGENT_BOARD_ID in your environment if the defaults don't fit.
